project_structure.description: Purina Promo Tactic Ordering monorepo with pnpm workspaces. Contains C# .NET backend API (CQRS pattern) and React/TypeScript frontend with shared component library and models.

subprojects.description: React/TypeScript frontend monorepo for tactic management UI
C# .NET backend API using CQRS pattern

decisions.why: CRITICAL: UserBadge component must follow ADR-15 component-centric v2.0 testId pattern with helper functions in component.testids.ts
Guidance on component library choices; UserBadge is simple molecule, can use basic React + TailwindCSS
E2E tests for UserBadge should test different user roles using storage state patterns

persona.why: Story serves all user personas by displaying their identity and role in the header

target_architecture.why: UserBadge integrates with existing authentication/authorization flow that provides user data

components.why: Existing header component on Details/Create pages; UserBadge can extend this or be placed alongside
Reference for badge styling and component patterns
Icon system for user icon in badge

services.why: Provides getCurrentUser() API call that fetches user data from /user/me endpoint

models.why: User interface defines userId and roles array that UserBadge will display

apis.why: useUser() hook provides access to current user data in React components

tests.why: E2E tests should verify UserBadge visibility on Search and Details pages with different user roles
